body_html: M. Zhai, T. Yang, N. Sun*, and Y. Fang, “Observer-based adaptive fuzzy control of underactuated offshore cranes for cargo stabilization with respect to ship decks,” Mechanism and Machine Theory, vol. 175, Art. no. 104927, Sept. 2022.
